info.name: FormVox
info.summary: File-based forms and polls for Nextcloud
info.description:
FormVox is a file-based forms and polls app for Nextcloud. Unlike traditional form apps, FormVox stores everything in .fvform files — no database tables needed.
**Features:** * 100% file-based storage (.fvform files) * Question types: text, textarea, single/multiple choice, dropdown, date, time, number, scale, rating, file upload, matrix, table * Conditional logic and page routing * Quiz mode with scoring * Export to CSV, JSON, and ODT (with custom template support) * Import from Microsoft Forms * Per-form branding with visual page builder * Answer piping (use previous answers in later questions) * Charts and visualizations in Results view * Webhooks and REST API for integrations * Collaborative editing with real-time presence indicators * Notifications on new responses * Password protection and expiration for public links * Multi-language: English, Dutch, German, French
**Unique Benefits:** * One file contains everything (definition + responses) * Works with Nextcloud's versioning and sharing * End-to-end encryption compatible * No database migrations needed
**Perfect for:** * Surveys and feedback forms * Quizzes and assessments * Event registrations * Expense declarations * Data collection with privacy requirements
info.author: Sam Ditmeijer
Rik Dekker
